body.title: Intentions are phrased as positive observable targets
body.statement: Every decision summary, root intention, and ticket intention names a thing to move TOWARD — 'I intend that <observable state>' or a verb describing the desired observable state. A summary that opens with no/don't/never/avoid/stop/prevent, or names only an absence, fails the frame and must be rewritten around what to do instead.
body.why: A prohibition tells the builder nothing about what to build; only a positive target is checkable against the runtime (CP3 — there's always a why; the why points somewhere). Prohibition-only decisions are how 'don't do X' ships as 'nothing shipped'.
